initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, SUM(e.cost) AS total_expense, SUM(i.amount) AS total_income
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
ORDER BY total_expense DESC, total_income DESC
LIMIT 5;

LEFT JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
